description: Diagnostic Thai utterances for comparing candidate recorded-voice providers.

items.label: ก (current cloud input)
items.note: Checks whether whitespace creates an unnatural pause.

items.label: ก (joined input)
items.note: Same consonant name without an explicit word boundary.

items.label: ค (current cloud input)
items.note: A second spaced consonant name with an aspirated onset.

items.label: ค (joined input)
items.note: Same consonant name without an explicit word boundary.

items.label: เกอะ
items.note: Known Apple Kanya failure: it splits or misreads this isolated form.

items.label: เลอะ (anchor word)
items.note: Real-word anchor for the same short vowel as เกอะ.

items.label: กั- (current cloud input)
items.note: Current generator removes the final-slot dash and sends an incomplete syllable.

items.label: กั- (complete carrier)
items.note: Final น completes the syllable so the vowel can be pronounced in context.

items.label: เกิ- (current cloud input)
items.note: Incomplete long-vowel form used by the current cloud generator.

items.label: เกิ- (complete carrier)
items.note: Complete syllable used by the device-voice transformation.

items.label: กึ
items.note: Combining mark that can be announced by name instead of pronounced.

items.label: กึ- (complete carrier)
items.note: Complete carrier counterpart for the short closed form.

items.label: เกียะ
items.note: Short compound vowel.

items.label: เกือะ
items.note: Short compound vowel with a central component.

items.label: กำ
items.note: Short closed sara am form.

items.label: กา
items.note: Unmarked mid tone; completes the controlled 5-tone minimal set on ก.

items.label: ก่า
items.note: Low tone on a mid-class consonant.

items.label: ก้า
items.note: Falling tone on a mid-class consonant.

items.label: ก๊า
items.note: High tone on a mid-class consonant.

items.label: ก๋า
items.note: Rising tone on a mid-class consonant.

items.label: ขา (khǎa, leg)
items.note: Real-word rising tone for a natural-prosody contrast with the ค่า/ค้า pair.

items.label: ค่า (khâa, value)
items.note: Real-word falling tone; same khaa base, hear whether the fall is distinct.

items.label: ค้า (kháa, trade)
items.note: Real-word high tone; the hardest contrast against the falling ค่า.

items.label: คร-
items.note: Aspirated smooth cluster.

items.label: ขร-
items.note: High-class aspirated smooth cluster.

items.label: ปล-
items.note: Common smooth cluster and real word.

items.label: ทร-
items.note: Irregular cluster whose expected onset differs from its spelling.

items.label: ครู
items.note: Cluster sample word.

items.label: คลาน
items.note: Long cluster sample word.

items.label: โลก
items.note: Long vowel with a final stop.

items.label: ก้าว
items.note: Diphthong and falling tone.
